Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David S. Zalob, Atty. for Judgment Creditor and moving party: Leslie L. Kish
Telisha Brown, Judgment Debtor

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. Earnings withheld to be returned to judgment debtor. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
